description: CompositionWhite kurta with silver stripes, made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves, round neck with smocking along the front chest and a buttoned chest placket, and has hakoba detailing between the sleeves and torso, and also along the length of the kurtaFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this white kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its smocked front neck, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
